mission: M-0002 Phase 2 - Cross-Domain Validation with BEIR
focus: M-0002.2 BM25 baselines across all 15 public BEIR datasets; M-0002.3 lexical technique matrix groundwork

functional_validation.check: All 15 public BEIR datasets baselined vs published references
functional_validation.detail: 13/15 within +/-9% (10 within +/-5%); aggregate mean nDCG@10 0.4261 vs published ~0.43. Documented exception: FEVER -13.8% and Climate-FEVER -12.6% (shared corpus, ADL-0005, operator-approved document-and-proceed).

functional_validation.check: Cranfield + Tier 1 lexical technique matrix (coverage, PRF over field-sum)
functional_validation.detail: Both rerankers classify domain-conditional; exact Phase 1 fidelity reproduced (Cranfield coverage 0.3095, PRF 0.3260).
61 tests pass including 7 new frozen-hyperparameter guards.
SciFact reproduces 0.6906 through the retry-hardened search path.

infra_evidence.pattern: sequential index -> evaluate -> drop on a single free-tier OpenSearch instance (4GB/20GB)
infra_evidence.largest_index: MS MARCO 8.84M docs (~3GB) and FEVER-family 5.42M docs, each fit alone and dropped after eval
infra_evidence.transient_failures_absorbed: 60+ bulk-load retries and search retries via backoff; one FEVER evaluation lost and re-run after hardening the evaluate path

anti_demo_note: Every baseline ran live over full test query sets against real OpenSearch indexes holding the complete corpora (verified doc counts match expected); no sampling or fixtures used for acceptance.
second_run_policy: Baseline reproduction against published numbers is itself the independent cross-check; the aggregate-on-target plus 13/15 within band substitutes for a second identical pass on deterministic BM25.
